issue: SEV1: Generic 5x3 errors and API timeouts observed globally across and payment endpoints
root_cause: PostgreSQL connection pool exhaustion due to missing pooler in middleware
resolution: Deploy PgBouncer for connection pooling and scale DB read replicas

issue: Slow response times (>1.5s) on static assets and images in production environment
root_cause: CDN cache miss spike due to improper TTL header configuration in S3 bucket
resolution: Adjust Cache-Control headers to max-age=31536000 and invalidate CloudFront cache

issue: Immediate OOMKilled events for node-service pods after deploying v1.2.4
root_cause: Node.js memory leak in the streaming logs collector introduced in the latest release
resolution: Rollback to v1.2.3 and patch the unclosed event listener and stream buffer

issue: Redis cluster OOM error on sidekiq workers
root_cause: Redis memory saturation in cluster mode
